Name: ThoughtSpot logo
Description: Clicking on the logo will return the user to the Insight page.

Name: Object Search
Description: The default state is to just show an icon of the object search
Dynamic Behavior:
Clicking on the icons will open the object search field. The user can then enter a text string into the field and press return or click the the icons to the far right of the field to iniate an object search.
Initiating a search will refresh the page and show the object search results page.
Default State: The default state is to just show an icon of the object search
Error State: If the user does not enter a string in object search field then the page and show the object search results page with a zero results view.

Name: Nine dot menu
Dynamic Behavior: Clicking on the icons will show the menu for the nine dot menu. This will show between 1 and 4 main navigation options as well as a See all answer, liveboards and Search data links.

Name: Help Icon
Description: Clicking on this will reveal the help menu. (This is powered by pendo)

Name: Profile Icon
Description: Click on this will reveal the profile menu. This will display the a sign out and profile link.
